description: A REVOKE targeting a prior PUSH sequence MUST be accepted silently; the implementation MUST NOT respond with ERROR

steps.comment: Send a PUSH so there is a valid sequence number to REVOKE.
seq_ref=2 targets the PUSH sent above (sequence 2 in this session after HANDSHAKE was sequence 1).
REVOKE MUST produce no response (spec §REVOKE: Expected response: None).
